covered_path_segment_count: {coverage_rule_text} How many path enemies are covered?
{coverage_rule_text} Count the path enemies covered by one or more towers.
{coverage_rule_text} What is the number of covered path enemies?
{coverage_rule_text} Report how many path enemies lie inside at least one tower range ring.
{coverage_rule_text} Count only the path enemies covered by at least one tower.
best_tower_position_label: {coverage_rule_text} Which candidate tower position covers the most path enemies?
{coverage_rule_text} Choose the candidate tower position that covers the most path enemies.
{coverage_rule_text} Which labeled candidate tower covers the largest number of path enemies?
{coverage_rule_text} Select the candidate position whose range ring contains the most path enemies.
{coverage_rule_text} Which candidate tower would cover the most enemies on the path?
nearest_exit_enemy_label: {coverage_rule_text} Which labeled enemy is closest to the exit along the path?
{coverage_rule_text} Choose the labeled enemy nearest to the exit by path order.
{coverage_rule_text} Which enemy label is farthest along the path toward the exit?
{coverage_rule_text} Select the labeled enemy that would leave the map first.
{coverage_rule_text} Which labeled path enemy is closest to the exit marker?

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_winding_path_covered_: a tower-defense map with a winding path, circular tower range rings, and small enemy markers on the path
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_switchback_path_cover: a tower-defense map with a switchback path, circular tower range rings, and small enemy markers on the path
code_prompt_defaults.coverage_rule_text_covered_path_segment_: A path enemy is covered when its center is inside at least one visible tower range ring.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_covered_path_segment_cou: set "annotation" to [x, y] pixel points at the centers of every covered path enemy
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_covered_path_segment_count: set "answer" to the number of path enemies covered by at least one tower range ring
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_winding_path_best_tow: a tower-defense map with a winding path, small enemy markers on the path, and four labeled candidate tower positions A through D
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_switchback_path_best_: a tower-defense map with a switchback path, small enemy markers on the path, and four labeled candidate tower positions A through D
code_prompt_defaults.coverage_rule_text_best_tower_position_l: A candidate covers a path enemy when that enemy's center is inside the candidate's visible range ring.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_best_tower_position_labe: set "annotation" to the [x, y] pixel point at the center of the chosen candidate tower
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_best_tower_position_label: set "answer" to the chosen candidate label, one of A, B, C, or D
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_winding_path_nearest_: a tower-defense map with a winding path, small enemy markers, six labeled path enemies A through F, and an exit marker
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_switchback_path_neare: a tower-defense map with a switchback path, small enemy markers, six labeled path enemies A through F, and an exit marker
code_prompt_defaults.coverage_rule_text_nearest_exit_enemy_la: Follow the drawn path toward the exit marker; compare path order, not straight-line distance.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_nearest_exit_enemy_label: set "annotation" to the [x, y] pixel point at the center of the selected labeled enemy
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_nearest_exit_enemy_label: set "answer" to the selected enemy label, one of A, B, C, D, E, or F
